Formatting guide:
## Heading — section heading
**bold text** — bold
_italic text_ — italics
• item or - item — bullet point
--- — dividing line

AI Essay Writer

Enter your essay question or focus below. The AI will generate a full Grade 6–9 model essay using AQA technique, ACT introduction, and close analysis.

Essays are AI-generated model answers for revision use. Always apply your own thinking.
